description: Single summary: goal, issue tracker link, affected areas (services, apps, paths), how acceptance will be verified (tests, manual checklist, etc.), and links or pointers to team standards if needed.

userStories.title: Imperative title describing the deliverable
userStories.description: As a <role>, I need <capability> so that <outcome>.
acceptanceCriteria: Observable behavior or interface change, stated so it can be verified
Quality bar for this repo (e.g. tests pass, lint/format, typecheck as applicable)
Non-functional or architectural notes only if they gate acceptance

userStories.title: Follow-up or dependent deliverable
userStories.description: As a <role>, I need work that builds on US-001 to remain consistent end to end.
acceptanceCriteria: Criteria tied to the dependency (e.g. contract, types, or UX aligned with US-001)
Tests or checks appropriate to this component
